column2: Apple iPhone 17 Pro
column3:
The Apple iPhone 17 Pro is the pinnacle of performance, design, and innovation in Apple’s smartphone lineup. Featuring a sleek, durable body and a Super Retina XDR display, it delivers stunning visuals with ultra-smooth ProMotion technology. Powered by Apple’s latest A17 Bionic (or M-series mobile) chip, the iPhone 17 Pro handles gaming, multitasking, and creative workflows effortlessly.

Its pro-grade camera system brings cinematic photography and video into your hands, with advanced computational photography, Night mode, and intelligent image processing for every scenario. With fast 5G connectivity, extended battery life, MagSafe compatibility, and iOS’s seamless ecosystem, the iPhone 17 Pro is built for those who demand power, precision, and elegance every day.

column2: JBL GO4
column3:
Grab and go

Take big JBL Pro sound wherever you go. The bold, colorful JBL Go 4 ultra-portable Bluetooth speaker fits in the palm of your hand, delivering clear, loud JBL Pro Sound with rich, punchy bass. Its newly redesigned integrated loop makes it easy to bring anywhere, and the variety of colorways means you can choose one that fits your vibe. Plus it's waterproof and dustproof, so it loves to go outside. And up to 7 hours of playtime means it will keep the good times rolling throughout a fun day trip or an evening chilling under the stars. Pair two Go 4's for stereo sound, or wirelessly connect multiple JBL Auracast-enabled speakers for even bigger sound. Crank it up and let your music take you anywhere.

column2: Jbl Flip 7
column3:
JBL Flip 7 Portable Waterproof and Drop-proof Bluetooth Speaker - White | Flip 7

The JBL Flip 7 is the latest addition to JBL’s Flip series, delivering powerful bass, crystal-clear audio, and enhanced durability in a compact, portable design. With IP68 waterproof and dustproof certification, it can withstand extreme outdoor conditions, making it the perfect speaker for pool parties, hikes, and beach outings. Featuring AI Sound Boost Technology, the Flip 7 optimizes sound output, ensuring a balanced and immersive audio experience even at high volumes. Up to 14 hours of playtime on a single charge ensures uninterrupted entertainment, while Bluetooth 5.4 and Auracast allow seamless wireless connections. Built with 77% recycled plastic and a 100% recycled fabric grille, it’s an eco-friendly choice without compromising performance.

  • AI Sound Boost Technology – Enhances clarity and bass performance while minimizing distortion.

  • Auracast Multi-Speaker Pairing – Connect multiple Auracast-compatible JBL speakers for synchronized sound.

column2: Apple Pencil (USB-C)
column3:
Overview

Apple Pencil (USB-C) is perfect for taking notes, sketching, marking up documents, journaling, and more. It delivers pixel‑perfect precision, low latency, and tilt sensitivity. So it’s as natural to use as a pencil.

Apple Pencil (USB-C) pairs and charges via a USB-C Charge Cable. It magnetically attaches to the side of iPad for storage.

Apple Pencil (USB-C) supports Apple Pencil hover when used with iPad Pro 13-inch (M5), iPad Pro 11-inch (M5), iPad Pro 13-inch (M4), iPad Pro 11-inch (M4), iPad Pro 12.9-inch (6th generation), iPad Pro 11-inch (4th generation), iPad Air 13-inch (M3), iPad Air 11-inch (M3), iPad Air 13-inch (M2), and iPad Air 11-inch (M2).

column2: Apple Pencil Pro
column3:
Overview

Apple Pencil Pro adds even more magical capabilities to help bring your ideas to life. New advanced features make marking up, taking notes, and creating a masterpiece more intuitive than ever.

Squeeze. Apple Pencil Pro can sense when you squeeze it and brings up a new palette so you can quickly switch tools, line weights, and colors.

Barrel roll. A new gyroscope allows you to rotate Apple Pencil Pro for precise control of shaped pen and brush tools.

Haptic feedback. A custom haptic engine provides precise feedback you can feel. When you squeeze or double tap, you’ll feel a light pulse confirming the action.

Apple Pencil hover.¹ Preview exactly where your Apple Pencil will touch down on your display and see a virtual shadow of your tool. So you can write, sketch, and illustrate with even greater precision.

Double tap. Quickly switch between tools, like a pen and eraser, with a double tap on Apple Pencil.

And if you misplace Apple Pencil Pro while you’re out and about or at home, you can easily locate it in the Find My app. Apple Pencil Pro attaches, pairs, and charges magnetically on the side of your iPad.

column2: Apple HomePod (2nd Gen) — Smart Speaker with Spatial Audio, Siri, and Room-Sensing Intelligence- Midnight
column3:
The Apple HomePod (2nd Generation) is a high-fidelity smart speaker that brings rich, immersive sound and intelligent control to any room. Powered by Apple’s S7 chip, this speaker analyzes your space in real time to adapt its sound output with room-sensing technology, delivering consistent, balanced audio no matter where it's placed.

Equipped with a high-excursion woofer, five beamforming tweeters, and advanced computational audio, the HomePod fills your room with crisp vocals, deep bass, and precise spatial clarity. It supports Spatial Audio with Dolby Atmos for a truly cinematic experience when paired with Apple TV 4K.

With built-in Siri, HomePod controls your smart home devices, answers questions, sets reminders, and recognizes different household voices. Meet the Levoit Core Mini Air Purifier, your go‑to solution for crisp, clean air in compact spaces. Engineered for bedrooms, home offices, dorm rooms, or travel, this sleek and lightweight purifier keeps your air fresh while blending seamlessly into any environment.

It uses a three-stage filtration system to trap pollutants and odors:

1. Pre-Filter – Captures large particles like hair, lint, and dust.

3. Activated Carbon Filter – Absorbs odors, fumes, and volatile organic compounds (VOCs).

With its built-in aromatherapy feature, you can add a few drops of your favorite essential oils to the aroma pad, creating a relaxing and refreshing atmosphere as it purifies the air.

The 360° VortexAir™ Technology pulls air from all directions, and QuietKEAP™ Technology ensures whisper-quiet operation—down to just 25 decibels. This makes it perfect for nighttime use, ensuring undisturbed sleep.

The Core Mini is incredibly easy to use, featuring a single-button control that cycles through three fan speeds and resets the filter indicator. No apps or Wi-Fi are needed—just plug it in and breathe easy.

Thanks to its compact size and lightweight design, it's easy to carry and fits perfectly on a desk, nightstand, or countertop. It's also energy-efficient, using only 7 watts, costing less than $1 per year to operate, and is ENERGY STAR® certified.

If you're looking for a reliable, quiet, and affordable air purifier that fits anywhere and requires minimal effort, the Levoit Core Mini is the perfect match.

Multiple Display USB C Docking Station Resolution For Mac OS:
  • Single Display up to 4K@30Hz(HDMI 1/HDMI 2)

Revolutionary 50dB Active Noise Cancellation (ANC): Immerse yourself in pure sound by cutting out the world around you. Whether on a noisy subway or a crowded cafe, the Buds Pro 2 intelligently adapt ANC levels for an uninterrupted listening experience.

Smart Dial Control: The intuitive touch-sensitive smart dial lets you effortlessly adjust volume, skip tracks, answer calls, and activate voice assistants with precision and ease — all without reaching for your device.

Built tough with IP54 sweat and splash resistance, and crystal-clear calls thanks to a 6-mic array with advanced noise suppression. Compatible across Android, iOS, Windows, and macOS, plus a perfect fit guaranteed with three sizes of silicone ear tips.

column2: Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro (Graphite) – Intelligent ANC, Hi-Fi Sound, and 30-Hour Battery Life
column3:
The Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro delivers premium audio quality and cutting-edge features in a sleek, lightweight design. These true wireless earbuds feature dual dynamic drivers—a 10mm woofer for deep bass and a 5.3mm tweeter for crisp treble—ensuring an immersive sound experience for music, calls, and more. Equipped with Intelligent Active Noise Cancellation (ANC), the Buds2 Pro reduce external noise by up to 98%, allowing you to focus on your content without distractions. The Ambient Sound mode lets you stay aware of your surroundings, ideal for safety and multitasking.

With Bluetooth 5.3, the earbuds offer stable connectivity and a seamless pairing experience, especially with Galaxy devices. Voice Detect automatically switches to Ambient Mode and lowers playback volume when it detects speech, making conversations effortless. The earbuds are IPX7-rated for water resistance, ensuring durability against splashes and rain.

A long-lasting battery offers up to 8 hours of playback (5 hours with ANC), extendable to 30 hours with the charging case. Fast charging provides an hour of playtime from just 5 minutes of charging. The case supports wireless chargingand PowerShare with compatible Galaxy devices.

The Buds2 Pro come with an ergonomic design for a secure fit and include three sizes of silicone ear tips for comfort. Intuitive touch controls enable easy management of music, calls, and noise modes. The Galaxy Wearable app unlocks additional customization, including EQ settings and touch gestures.

  • Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.3
  • Noise Cancellation: Intelligent ANC and Ambient Sound mode

column2: Beats Solo Buds - True Wireless Earbuds
column3:
Featuring the tiniest case we’ve ever made, these mighty small earbuds are packed with incredibly big sound.

Fully-custom acoustic architecture

Ergonomically-angled acoustic nozzles for a natural fit

Extended earbud battery life with up to 18 hours of playback

Compatible with both iOS and Android, including one-touch pairing

Designed for music first.

The cleanly balanced tuning gives you the full range and emotion of all your favourite music with richly detailed clarity and power with accurate bass reproduction.

Custom dual-layer drivers.

Each earbud is powered by dual-layer transducers designed to minimise micro-distortions across the frequency curve, and purposefully positioned parallel with each acoustic nozzle to deliver sound directly to your ears.

Laser-cut venting.

Staying true to our music-first approach, the earbuds’ laser-cut vents were engineered to improve bass performance – and they also gently reduce air pressure for added comfort.

Four ear tip sizes.

To optimise comfort and passive noise isolation for diverse ear types and shapes, Beats Solo Buds come with four ear tip sizes — large, medium, small and extra-small.

Battery all day.

These tiny buds have all-day battery life with up to 18 hours of playback.¹ For extra power on the go, they can charge directly from your phone,³ tablet or laptop. And with Fast Fuel, a 5-minute charge gives up to 1 hour of playback.

iOS and Android friendly.

Beats Solo Buds are ready to pair with your Apple or Android device straight out of the box. This native compatibility means seamless one-touch pairing, automatic pre-pairing across your devices, plus Find My or Find My Device, for everybody.

Clear calls and Class 1 Bluetooth®.

Each earbud is equipped with a custom-designed microphone powered by an advanced noise‑learning algorithm to help deliver exceptional call quality. Enjoy extended range with fewer drop‑outs thanks to industry-leading Class 1 Bluetooth®.

    • 4 x LAN (10/100 Mbps)

    • 1 x USB 2.0 port (for models like RT-AC1200GE)

  • Processor: MediaTek MT7628AN @ 580 MHz

  • Memory: 64 MB RAM, 16 MB Flash

  • Operating Modes: Router, Access Point

  • Additional Features:

    • Parental Controls

    • ASUSWRT dashboard UI for easy setup and management

    • Dual-WAN support (on select models)

column2: Imou Ranger S2 Portable WiFi Camera
column3:
The Imou Ranger S2 is a compact, versatile indoor security camera designed for comprehensive home or office surveillance. It offers a range of features that make it suitable for monitoring various environments.

Key Features

  • Resolution: 2MP (1920 x 1080) Full HD

  • Pan & Tilt: 355° horizontal and -10° to 80° vertical rotation for 360° coverage

  • Night Vision: Infrared night vision up to 10 meters (33 feet)

  • Digital Zoom: 8x digital zoom

  • Audio: Two-way audio with built-in microphone and speaker

  • Motion Detection: Detects motion and sends alerts

  • Human Detection: Differentiates between human movement and other motion

  • Abnormal Sound Alarm: Alerts when unusual sounds are detected

  • Privacy Mode: Allows you to disable the camera when needed

  • Storage: Supports Micro SD cards up to 256GB

  • Connectivity: Wi-Fi (IEEE802.11b/g/n) and 1x RJ45 10/100M Ethernet port

column2: Netis E3 AC1200 Wireless Dual Band Range WiFi Extender
column3:
The Netis E3 AC1200 Wireless Dual Band Range WiFi Extender is a versatile networking device designed to enhance and extend your existing Wi-Fi coverage. With its dual-band capabilities and multiple operating modes, it's suitable for various home and office networking needs.

Key Features

  • Dual-Band AC1200 Speeds: Delivers combined speeds of up to 1167 Mbps—300 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz band and 867 Mbps on the 5 GHz band—ensuring smooth HD streaming, online gaming, and other bandwidth-intensive tasks.

  • Three Operating Modes:

    • Router Mode: Sets up a secure internal network from a DSL or cable modem.

    • Access Point (AP) Mode: Extends a wired network to wireless devices.

    • Repeater Mode: Amplifies existing wireless signals to areas with weak or no coverage.

  • Smart Signal Indicator: Assists in finding the optimal placement for the extender to achieve the best coverage.

  • WPS Button: Allows for quick and secure setup with compatible routers.

  • High-Gain Antennas: Equipped with two 3dBi dual-band omnidirectional antennas to enhance signal strength and coverage.

  • Wired Connectivity: Includes a 10/100 Mbps Ethernet port for connecting wired devices like gaming consoles or smart TVs.

  • Compact Design: Its portable and wall-plug design makes it easy to deploy without taking up much space.
